question: List the patients with a birthyear of 1990 and a birthmonth of December. patients with a birthyear of 1990 and a birthmonth of December refers to substr(birthday,1,7) AS 'year-month',WHERE year = '1990' AND month = '10';
original_symbolic: List the [T4] with a [C121] of [V2] and a [C121] of [V1]. [T4] with a [C121] of [V2] and a [C121] of [V1] refers to substr([C121],1,7) AS '[C121]-[C121]',WHERE [C121] = '[V2]' AND [C121] = '[V3]';; [V1] is a value of the column [C121]; [V2] is a value of the column [C121]; [V3] is a value of the column [C121]
original_question: List the football players with a birthyear of 1970 and a birthmonth of October. players with a birthyear of 1970 and a birthmonth of October refers to substr(birthday,1,7) AS 'year-month',WHERE year = '1970' AND month = '10';

question: Between Mack and Kenw, which truck has shipped more shipments? Find the difference in the number of shipments they have shipped.  Mack refers to make = 'Mack'; Kenw refers to make = 'Kenworth'; calculation = SUBTRACT(SUM(make = 'Mack'), SUM(make = 'Kenworth'))

[V3] refers to [C15] = '[V2]'; [V1] refers to [C15] = '[V1]'; calculation = SUBTRACT(SUM([C15] = '[V1]'), SUM([C15] = '[V2]')); [V1] is a value of the column [C15]; [V2] is a value of the column [C15]; [V3] is a value of the column [C15]
original_question: Between DC and Marvel Comics, which publisher has published more superheroes? Find the difference in the number of superheroes they have published.  DC refers to publisher_name = 'DC Comics'; Marvel Comics refers to publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics'; calculation = SUBTRACT(SUM(publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics'), SUM(publisher_name = 'DC Comics'))

question: What is the percentage of persons who operate camera? Indicate how many of the said persons were awarded by Primetime Emmy Awards. awarded by Primetime Emmy Awards refers to organization = 'Primetime Emmy Awards'; persons who operate camera refers to role = 'camera operator'; calculation = MULTIPLY(DIVIDE(SUM(role = 'camera operator'); count(person_id)), 100)
original_symbolic: What is the percentage of [T9] who [V1]? Indicate how many of the said [T9] were [T7] by [V2]. [T7] by [V2] refers to [C15] = '[V2]'; [T9] who [V1] refers to [C1] = '[V3]'; calculation = MULTIPLY(DIVIDE(SUM([C1] = '[V3]'); count([C2])), 100); [V1] is a value of the column [C1]; [V2] is a value of the column [C15]; [V3] is a value of the column [C1]
original_question: What is the percentage of superheroes who act in their own self-interest or make decisions based on their own moral code? Indicate how many of the said superheroes were published by Marvel Comics. published by Marvel Comics refers to publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics'; superheroes who act in their own self-interest or make decisions based on their own moral code refers to alignment = 'Bad'; calculation = MULTIPLY(DIVIDE(SUM(alignment = 'Bad'); count(id)), 100)

question: Describe the roles of Edgar category awards.  roles of awards refers to role; Edgar category refers to award_category = 'Edgar';
